disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive abdominal distension over a week, acutely worse in the last 24 hours, with a tight hard belly
trigger_question_examples: What has changed with his belly?
How long has the swelling been building up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His belly has been swelling up all week and got much worse yesterday — it's tight and hard now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Breathlessness that is worse lying flat, relieved by sitting propped up (mechanical splinting of the diaphragm)
trigger_question_examples: Is his breathing worse when he lies down?
What helps him breathe more easily?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He can't catch his breath, especially lying down — we've had to prop him up on pillows to help him breathe.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New confusion, drowsiness and disorientation to time, still rousable to voice
trigger_question_examples: Has he been more confused or muddled than usual?
Is he more sleepy or hard to wake?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's foggy and muddled — he doesn't know what day it is and he's very sleepy, but he still wakes up when I talk to him.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known long-standing liver disease with chronic yellowing of the eyes and skin
trigger_question_examples: Does he have any liver problems?
Has he always had a yellow tinge to his eyes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, he's had liver trouble for a long time and his eyes and skin have been a bit yellow for a while.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Stopped the diuretic and has not taken the lactulose syrup for about 4 days (precipitant of the current deterioration)
trigger_question_examples: Has he been taking all his usual medicines?
When did he last take his water tablet and his laxative syrup?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's missed his water tablets and hasn't had the laxative syrup for about four days now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies vomiting blood or coffee-ground vomit, denies black tarry or bloody stools, denies fever (pertinent negatives — do not exclude SBP or variceal risk)
trigger_question_examples: Has he vomited any blood or anything like coffee grounds?
Have his stools been black or bloody? Any fevers or shivers?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, he hasn't vomited any blood and I haven't seen any black or bloody poo, and he doesn't feel hot or feverish.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent falls at home with forearm bruising; carer unable to safely mobilise him; bedbound today
trigger_question_examples: Has he had any falls recently?
Are you able to help him move around safely at home?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's had a couple of falls and has bruises on his arms; I can't safely lift him and he's been stuck in bed today.
